title: Caterserve Premium 18 Micron Food Service Catering Aluminium Foil Roll, 30cm x 50m
features: Durable extra heavy duty 18 micron aluminum foil roll
Premium food service quality foil wrap - In a reinforced corrugated cutter box
Great For Restaurants, Infomercial Kitchens, Take Outs, Schools, Delis,Catering,and Home use
WRAP to keep food fresh & prevent freezer burn - LINE pans before cooking for easy cleanup - COVER bowls to keep food moist & prevent splatters!
description: Product Description Whether you're wrapping up leftovers, cooking up a storm in the kitchen, or running a busy food service operation, you can count on Caterserve Premium Heavy Duty Kitchen Foil to provide the strength, durability, and reliability you need to get the job done right. Made from high-quality, food-grade aluminum. Safe for use with all types of food, avoid using with acidic and salty foods. Non-toxic and recyclable material. Easy to use and tear, with no need for scissors or other cutting tools. Caterserve Premium Heavy Duty Kitchen Foil The Ultimate Solution for Your Catering Needs. Introducing Caterserve Premium Heavy Duty Kitchen Foil, the perfect choice for all your food service and catering needs. Made from high-quality 18-micron thick aluminum, our foil roll is strong, durable, and perfect for use in any kitchen. Measuring 30cm x 50 metres, this roll of foil is ideal for all your wrapping needs, from sandwiches to food storage or cooking. Perfect for use in commercial kitchens, cafes, restaurants, and other food service settings. Heavy-duty 18-micron thickness for superior strength and durability. Large 50-meter roll provides ample foil for all your needs. 30cm width fits most standard kitchen or catering needs. Multi-purpose foil can be used for cooking, storing, and wrapping. Ideal for use in the home kitchen, as well as for catering, food service, and more. Keeps food fresh and prevents leaks and spills.
